controlled_mutation: The gate itself is the mutation â€” an expired gate in pending/.
phase4_lock_requirement: cleanup and TTL enforcement (not protected lock protection)
restoration_steps: Remove expired gate file from pending/
expected_helios_behavior: Gate validation rejects due to expiry.
setup: Create a pending gate with expires_utc set to a past time.
rational_insight: An expired gate is a mutable runtime lifecycle problem. pending/ must stay writable for the gate lifecycle. Phase 4 should not lock pending/ as protected runtime.
